name: Druzhyna Bludgeon
description: The Elder Prince's druzhyna doesn't give ground even in the face of insurmountable odds. It's most distinguished members may receive a great privilege - a gift of an honorary weapon granted personally by the Prince.
descriptionZh: 王公的德鲁日纳战场上即便无力回天，也绝对不会丢盔弃甲。战绩卓越的德鲁日纳可以获得特殊的荣耀，即有幸由大公亲自授予锤棍一根。
